name: Fletch
description: Feathered fletching notches stack into flights, re-aiming on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 0deg, 180deg, 180deg, 90deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 50%, 100% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 50% 50%, 100% 0, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0 50%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
